name: get_bel_pins
short_description: Get a list of bel_pins in the device.
full_help:
get_bel_pins

Description: 
Get a list of bel_pins in the device.

Syntax: 
get_bel_pins  [-of_objects <args>] [-regexp] [-nocase] [-filter <arg>] [-quiet]
              [-verbose] [<patterns>]

Returns: 
bel_pins

Usage: 
  Name           Description
  --------------------------
  [-of_objects]  Get 'bel_pin' objects of these types: 'net bel site pin'.
  [-regexp]      Patterns are full regular expressions
  [-nocase]      Perform case-insensitive matching. (valid only when -regexp 
                 specified)
  [-filter]      Filter list with expression
  [-quiet]       Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]     Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<patterns>]   Match the 'bel_pin' objects against patterns.
                 Default: *

Categories: 
Device, Object, XDC

arguments.description: Get 'bel_pin' objects of these types: 'net bel site pin'.
Perform case-insensitive matching. (valid only when -regexp specified)
Suspend message limits during command execution
